# YoTop10 — Master Audit: Milestones vs Reality

**Date**: 2026-05-15 | **Generated by 5 parallel deep-research agents**

---

## FULLY BUILT (Core Platform)

| # | Feature | Milestone |
|---|---------|-----------|
| 1 | Project foundation (Next.js 15, Express, MongoDB, Redis, ES, Docker, CI/CD) | M1 |
| 2 | Database schema — all 10+ collections with fields, indexes | M2 |
| 3 | Post submission (validation, rate limit, fingerprint, draft recovery) | M3 |
| 4 | Title similarity check (Damerau-Levenshtein, year detection) | M3.1 |
| 5 | Public feed (API + SSR homepage + infinite scroll) | M4 |
| 6 | Post detail with items, comments, reactions, history | M5 |
| 7 | SEO routing (slug-based, /post/[id] removed, canonical) | M5.5 |
| 8 | Categories system (10 parents, 300 children, nested slugs) | M6 |
| 9 | Category management (admin CRUD + bulk + analytics + export) | M10.7 |
| 10 | Comment system (nested, item-anchored, 2hr edit window) | M7 |
| 11 | Fire reactions (toggle on comments, spark recalculation) | M8 |
| 12 | Admin authentication (JWT, brute force, token version, setup token) | M9 |
| 13 | Notification system (Toast, bell badge, admin-to-user) | M9.1 |
| 14 | Admin dashboard + statistics (26 stats endpoints, 15-panel UI) | M10.1-M10.2 |
| 15 | Review queue (approve/reject/retry, bulk ops, collision detection) | M10.3 |
| 16 | Posts management (CRUD, feature, lock, bump, bulk, export) | M10.4 |
| 17 | Comments management (CRUD, flag, hide, highlight, bulk, penalty) | M10.5 |
| 18 | Outbound messaging (AdminMessage, templates, individual+broadcast) | M10.9b |
| 19 | Alert system (12 metrics, threshold CRUD, breach/resolution, cooldown) | M10.9 |
| 20 | Search backend (ES 4 indices, facets, highlights, did-you-mean, admin) | M12 |
| 21 | Search frontend (autocomplete, filters, tabs, pagination) | M12 |
| 22 | Audit logs (90-day TTL, CSV export, filtering) | M10.12 |
| 23 | User system (profiles, display names, trust tiers, rate limits) | M11 |
| 24 | Identity portability (12-word BIP39, ed25519, multi-device, claim page) | M15 |
| 25 | Post changelog (version history, side-by-side comparison) | V2.2 |
| 26 | Dark/light toggle + ThemeToggle component | V2.1 |
| 27 | Font system (Geist, Geist Mono, Anton, Monoton) | Extra |
| 28 | Profile image upload (200x200 WebP, first-letter fallback) | Extra |
| 29 | Image upload system (3 variants, sharp resize, multer) | Extra |
| 30 | Design system (glassmorphism CSS classes, spatial shadows, badges) | Extra |
| 31 | Mobile-first responsive layout (DynamicIsland, DesktopTopBar) | Extra |

---

## PARTIALLY BUILT

| # | Feature | What's Done | What's Missing |
|---|---------|-------------|----------------|
| 1 | **M10.7 Admin Categories page** | Backend fully built (17+ endpoints). Frontend page exists. | Drag-drop tree, scheduled publish, slug history UI, template editing |
| 2 | **M10.9b Admin Notifications page** | Backend fully built (7 endpoints). Frontend page exists. | User-facing message endpoint verification needed |
| 3 | **M10.10 Admin Search page** | Backend fully built (6 endpoints). Frontend page exists. | — |
| 4 | **M14 Hall of Fame** | Post `featured`/`editorial_note` fields + admin feature/unfeature toggle exist. | Public endpoint, public page, admin management page — all missing |
| 5 | **V2.3 Counter-List system** | `counter_list` type exists in Post model enum, rate limit exempt, title check bypass. | M5.6 Arena spec (90%: parent linking, comparison engine, VS view, spark scoring) — all missing |
| 6 | **M5.6.1 Post Spark Engine** | Comment Spark Score fully built (computeSparkScore, thresholds, tests). | Post-level spark scoring — Post model has no `spark_score` field |
| 7 | **V2.1 Design & Styling** | Dark/light toggle, mobile-first responsive done. | Futuristic theme, Retro (Myspace) theme — not built |
| 8 | **Submit page** | Full form with all features. | Post type selector — hardcoded to `top_list` only |
| 9 | **SEO** | Slug routing done. | Indexing guard (noindex for low-spark posts) — not built |
| 10 | **Route guard** | — | RESERVED_ROUTES check — not built |

---

## NOT BUILT (Zero Implementation)

| # | Feature | Milestone |
|---|---------|-----------|
| 1 | **Users Management** — admin user listing, ban, whitelist, shadow-ban | M10.6 |
| 2 | **Hall of Fame** — public page, admin curation, auto-candidates | M10.8 + M14 |
| 3 | **Rate Limits & Trust Scores Admin** — settings page, trust score UI | M10.11 |
| 4 | **Arguments Page** — hot debates, item-anchored aggregation | M13 |
| 5 | **Counter-List Arena** — challenger editor, VS comparison view, challenges gallery | M5.6.3-M5.6.7 |
| 6 | **Dynamic Reputation Engine ($R$)** — tiered quality matrix | M5.6.2 |
| 7 | **Weekly/Daily Seeds** — Arena seeding system | M5.6.6 |
| 8 | **Post-level Spark Engine** — 60/40 split, trust multipliers | M5.6.1 |
| 9 | **Double-Blind Moderation** | M11.C.1 |
| 10 | **SEO Indexing Guard** — noindex logic for low-quality posts | M5.5 |
| 11 | **Email Notifications** | V2.4 |
| 12 | **PWA & Offline Support** | V2.5 |
| 13 | **Futuristic Theme** | V2.1 |
| 14 | **Retro (Myspace) Theme** | V2.1 |
| 15 | **7 Admin UI Components**: StatsChart, CategoryTree, UserBadge, SearchInput, DateRangePicker, ExportButton, ConfirmDialog | M10.14 |
| 16 | **MinIO integration** — configured but unused, upload goes to local disk |
| 17 | **Date range filter** in public search | M12 |
| 18 | **Counter-List CTA button** on post detail page | M5 |

## GHOST FEATURES — Built, Zero Milestone Mention

### Backend (33 ghost endpoints/features)

| Category | Features |
|----------|----------|
| **Search analytics** | SearchEvent, SearchClick, SearchDailyStats, SearchDeadLetter models; searchAnalyticsCron; 9 search analytics endpoints |
| **Admin post ops** | Item CRUD, duplicate, activity, quality check, revisions, CSV export |
| **Admin comment ops** | Penalty system, dismiss-flag, stats/export endpoints |
| **Admin stats** | 17 undocumented stats endpoints (lurkers, conversion, reengagement, lifecycle, submissions, search behavior, etc.) |
| **Platform** | PlatformSnapshot system, FingerprintObservation model, UserEvent model |
| **Audit** | UsernameHistory, CategoryAudit, TrustScoreLog models |
| **Rate limit** | Ladder system, active boosts, per-user overrides |
| **Identity** | AuthChallenge model, identityCrypto library |

### Frontend (15+ ghost components)

| Component | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| `GlassSlab.tsx` | Self-animating card with wiki badges, argument bars |
| `DataCard.tsx` | Data card wrapper |
| `DesktopTopBar.tsx` | Fixed header with logo, search, bells |
| `DynamicIsland.tsx` | Mobile floating dock (5 tabs) |
| `ArgumentBar.tsx` | Support/contradict bar |
| `ArgumentTicker.tsx` | Live pulse scroll |
| `ConsensusHeatmap.tsx` | Consensus visualization |
| `CommandSearch.tsx` | Command palette search modal |
| `FloatingDock.tsx` | Mobile bottom nav |
| `NavUserAvatar.tsx` | Profile avatar (image + first-letter) |
| `SecureMyAuthority.tsx` | Identity section with device manager |
| `SeedDisplayModal.tsx` | Seed phrase modal |
| `AnalyticsBeacon.tsx` | Page visit tracking |
| `AuthInitializer.tsx` | Auth store hydration |
| `Toast.tsx` | Toast notification singleton |

### Pages (3 ghost routes)

| Route | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| `/username-history` | Username change history |
| `/notifications` | User notification feed |
| `/notifications/[id]` | Notification detail |

## TESTING GAP — Critical

**79% of lib files lack tests** — 19 of 24 lib files have no `*.test.ts`:

- `alertEngine.ts`, `auditWriter.ts`, `elasticsearch.ts`, `env.ts`, `fingerprintMatching.ts`, `flagEngine.ts`, `ladderSystem.ts`, `listTitleValidation.ts`, `modelRegistry.ts`, `pageVisitWriter.ts`, `platformSnapshot.ts`, `postCountReconciler.ts`, `redis.ts`, `searchAnalyticsCron.ts`, `searchRateLimit.ts`, `titleSimilarity.ts`, `trustScore.ts`, `trustScoreWorker.ts`, `upload.ts`, `userEventWriter.ts`, `usernameService.ts`, `adminAuth.ts`
